chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P No. D- 5948 of 2022 _________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________________ Direction. 1. For order on Misc. No. 25942/22 (U/A) 2. For order as to maintainability of petition. --------------- 13.10.2022. Mr. Muhammad Nazim Khokhar, Advocate for Petitioner. -------------------- After being confronted as to maintainability of this Petition, as apparently, PIA has no Statutory Service Rules, Counsel does not press this Petition and submits that the Petitioner would avail civil remedy in accordance with law. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz P.S.
